name: Hrvatske vode (Croatian Waters) Geoportal
dataType: Flood hazard and risk maps, agglomerations, protected water areas, hydrological basins
description: Interactive geoportal of Croatian Waters providing thematic spatial data on flood hazard zones, water protection areas, agglomerations, and hydrological infrastructure across Croatia.

name: Bioportal - Nature Protection Information System
operator: Ministry of Economy and Sustainable Development (formerly HAOP)
dataType: Natura 2000 areas, protected areas, species distribution, habitat maps, speleological objects
description: Croatia's national biodiversity and nature protection information system providing interactive maps of Natura 2000 sites, protected areas, species occurrence, habitat types, and invasive alien species.

name: ISPU - Physical Planning Information System
operator: Ministry of Physical Planning, Construction and State Assets
dataType: Spatial plans, zoning, building permits, energy certificates, spatial interventions
description: National interoperable system integrating all Croatian spatial plans, building permits, and spatial interventions into a single geoportal with cadastre and plan overlay capabilities.

name: DHMZ Hydrological and Climate Data Portal
dataType: River water levels, discharge, water temperature, climate normals, precipitation, temperature extremes
description: Croatian national archive of hydrological and climate data including water levels, river discharge, climate normals, and extremes from a network of 450 automatic monitoring stations.

name: Croatian Seismological Survey - Earthquake Data
operator: Department of Geophysics, Faculty of Science, University of Zagreb
dataType: Earthquake catalogs, seismic station data, accelerograms, seismic hazard maps
description: Croatian Seismograph Network operated by the University of Zagreb providing real-time earthquake monitoring, seismic catalogs, and hazard maps for the Croatian territory.

name: DGU LiDAR / LIFE CroLiS Elevation Data
dataType: Airborne LiDAR point clouds, DTM, DSM, nDSM at 1 m resolution
description: Nationwide airborne LiDAR campaign covering all of Croatia at 15-40 points per square metre, providing DTM, DSM, and normalised surface models at 1 m resolution under open data policy.

name: HHI - Hydrographic Institute Adriatic Data
operator: Hydrographic Institute of the Republic of Croatia (HHI)
dataType: Nautical charts, bathymetry, tide tables, sea level data, coastline geometry
cost: partly free (coastline open; charts for purchase)
description: Croatia's official hydrographic authority producing nautical charts, electronic navigational charts, bathymetric data, tide tables, and coastline geometry for the Adriatic Sea.

name: NIPP - National Spatial Data Infrastructure Geoportal
dataType: INSPIRE-harmonised metadata catalog, aggregated view/download services from 1000+ spatial data sources
description: Croatia's national INSPIRE-compliant SDI geoportal aggregating metadata and network services from over 1000 spatial data sources registered by public authorities.

name: ARSO Seismology Portal - Earthquake Monitoring Slovenia
dataType: Earthquake catalogs, seismic station data, hazard maps, macroseismic intensity reports
description: ARSO seismology office providing real-time earthquake monitoring, historical earthquake catalogs, seismic hazard maps, and annual seismicity reports for Slovenia and surrounding regions.

name: e-Prostor - Slovenian Geodetic and Spatial Planning Portal
dataType: Cadastral parcels, buildings, topographic data, real estate register, spatial plans, INSPIRE metadata
description: Slovenia's central geodetic and spatial data portal providing free access to cadastral parcels, building footprints, topographic data, real estate register, and INSPIRE-harmonised metadata catalog.

name: ZGS Forest Data Viewer
dataType: Forest stand maps, forest management plans, hunting management plans, tree species composition, growing stock
description: Public interactive map viewer of the Slovenia Forest Service displaying 320,000+ forest stands with attributes, forest management and hunting management plans, and associated forest data layers.

name: Atlas voda - Water Management Spatial Viewer
dataType: Water bodies, flood hazard maps, water protection zones, riparian areas, water rights, hydrological data
description: Web-based spatial viewer of the Slovenian Water Agency providing informative spatial content on water bodies, flood hazard zones, water protection areas, and water management data.

name: GeoZS Geological Survey Portal - Detailed Geology Maps
dataType: Geological maps (1:100k, 1:250k, 1M), hydrogeological maps, geochemical data, borehole logs, landslide inventory
description: Geological Survey of Slovenia providing harmonised geological maps, hydrogeological data, borehole databases, and geochemical surveys with INSPIRE-compliant WMS/WFS services.

name: Slovenian Forestry Institute - National Forest Inventory
dataType: National Forest Inventory data, forest health monitoring, wildlife ecology, bark beetle outbreaks
spatialResolution: NFI grid plots (4x4 km base grid)
description: National research institute conducting Slovenia's National Forest Inventory, forest health monitoring, and wildlife ecology research, publishing annual state-of-forests reports.

name: OPSI - Odprti podatki Slovenije (Open Data Portal)
dataType: 8000+ datasets spanning environment, transport, economy, health, spatial data
formats: CSV, JSON, XML, Shapefile, GeoJSON, RDF
description: Slovenia's national open data portal built on CKAN, aggregating 8000+ public-sector datasets including environmental, spatial, and statistical data with machine-readable formats.

name: FloVegSi - Fauna, Flora and Vegetation Database of Slovenia
operator: ZRC SAZU (Research Centre of the Slovenian Academy of Sciences and Arts)
dataType: Species occurrence records, vegetation releves, floristic data, faunistic data (1.5M+ records)
description: Major biodiversity database of Slovenia maintained by ZRC SAZU containing over 1.5 million records of faunistic, floristic, and phytocoenological data with geographic locations.

name: GeolISS - Geological Information System of Serbia
operator: Faculty of Mining and Geology, University of Belgrade / Ministry of Mining and Energy
dataType: Geological maps, borehole data, mineral resources, geohazards, hydrogeology
description: Serbia's national geological information system providing digital geological maps, borehole databases, mineral resource inventories, and geohazard data through an ESRI ArcGIS-based web portal.

name: Srbijasume Forestry Geoportal
dataType: State forest boundaries, forest management units, forest estates, growing stock data
description: Geoportal of Serbia's state forestry enterprise managing 890,000 ha of state forests, providing spatial views of forest estates, management units, and growing stock data across 18 forest estates.

name: SEPA - Serbian Environmental Protection Agency Data Portal
dataType: Air quality, water quality index, waste management, pollution registry, land degradation, allergen pollen
description: Serbia's environmental protection agency providing monitoring data on air and water quality, waste management, pollution sources, land degradation, and pollen concentration through multiple web portals.

name: SEPA AMSKV - National Air Quality Monitoring Network
dataType: Real-time PM10, PM2.5, SO2, NO2, O3, CO concentrations from automatic stations
description: Real-time air quality monitoring network of Serbia with approximately 85 automatic stations publishing hourly pollutant concentrations for national and EU-level reporting.

name: Seismological Survey of Serbia - Earthquake Portal
operator: Republicki seizmoloski zavod (Seismological Survey of Serbia)
dataType: Earthquake catalogs, seismic alerts, accelerograph data, seismic hazard maps
description: Serbia's state seismological institute operating 21 seismic stations and 25 accelerographs for real-time earthquake monitoring, providing automatic alerts, earthquake catalogs, and hazard assessments.

name: Vojvodina Provincial Geoportal
dataType: Provincial spatial data, cadastral layers, land use, infrastructure, administrative boundaries
description: Geoportal of the Autonomous Province of Vojvodina providing provincial spatial data layers, cadastral information, land use maps, and infrastructure data with download and API access.

name: RHMZ Serbia - Hydrological Monitoring and Data
dataType: Water levels, discharge, water temperature, ice events for Danube, Sava, Drina and other rivers
spatialResolution: station-based (54 reporting stations on major rivers)
description: Hydrological branch of Serbia's national hydrometeorological service monitoring water levels, discharge, temperature, and ice events across 54 stations on the Danube, Sava, Drina, and other major rivers.

name: Republic Directorate for Water - Flood and Water Data
operator: Republic Directorate for Water (Republicka direkcija za vode)
dataType: River basin management plans, flood risk maps, water management plans, water quality data
description: Serbia's water policy authority publishing river basin management plans, flood hazard and risk maps, and water quality data aligned with EU Water Framework Directive requirements.
